item.title: Balkan Pompe Ignition
item.description: El mosaic musical dels Balcans i l’energia i l’elegància del jazz gitano, units pel nomadisme de la música romaní, creen una experiència sonora extraordinària, un univers musical, una germandat. Com el propi nom de la banda, d’origen eslau, indica… BRATIA. Gravat a Sol de Sants Studios, Barcelona, per Alberto Pérez. Mescla i masterització per Yves Roussel.

item.title: Balkan Pompe Ignition
item.description: The musical myriad of the Balkans and the energy and elegance of gypsy jazz, brought together by the nomadism of Roma music, create an extraordinary sonic experience, a musical universe, a brotherhood. As the band’s very name of Slavic origin suggests… BRATIA. Recorded at Sol de Sants Studios, Barcelona, by Alberto Pérez. Mixed and mastered by Yves Roussel.

item.title: Balkan Pompe Ignition
item.description: El mosaico musical de los Balcanes y la energía y elegancia del jazz gitano, unidos por el nomadismo de la música romaní, crean una experiencia sonora extraordinaria, un universo musical, una hermandad. Como el propio nombre de la banda, de origen eslavo, indica… BRATIA. Grabado en Sol de Sants Studios, Barcelona, por Alberto Pérez. Mezcla y masterización por Yves Roussel.

item.title: Ivan Kovačević
item.description: Serbian double bass player Ivan Kovacevic is one of the leading musicians of the Spanish blues, jazz and rock’n’roll scene. Based in Barcelona for the last 20 years, he has played in renowned bands such as Los Mambo Jambo, Nu Niles, Down Home, Bernat Font Trio or Lazy Jumpers, among other collaborations in over 50 record albums. He now leads the largest rhythm ’n’ blues band in Europe, the Barcelona Big Blues Band, and is one of the founding members of the Barcelona Gipsy Balkan Orchestra – performing in over 35 countries worldwide.

item.title: Ivan Kovačević
item.description: Serbian double bass player Ivan Kovacevic is one of the leading musicians of the Spanish blues, jazz and rock’n’roll scene. Based in Barcelona for the last 20 years, he has played in renowned bands such as Los Mambo Jambo, Nu Niles, Down Home, Bernat Font Trio or Lazy Jumpers, among other collaborations in over 50 record albums. He now leads the largest rhythm ’n’ blues band in Europe, the Barcelona Big Blues Band, and is one of the founding members of the Barcelona Gipsy Balkan Orchestra – performing in over 35 countries worldwide.

item.title: Ivan Kovačević
item.description: Serbian double bass player Ivan Kovacevic is one of the leading musicians of the Spanish blues, jazz and rock’n’roll scene. Based in Barcelona for the last 20 years, he has played in renowned bands such as Los Mambo Jambo, Nu Niles, Down Home, Bernat Font Trio or Lazy Jumpers, among other collaborations in over 50 record albums. He now leads the largest rhythm ’n’ blues band in Europe, the Barcelona Big Blues Band, and is one of the founding members of the Barcelona Gipsy Balkan Orchestra – performing in over 35 countries worldwide.

item.title: Pere Nolasc Plana Turu
item.description: A classically-trained violinist and violist who studied in Spain, the Netherlands and Germany, Pere Nolasc focuses his interests on improvisation and creativity. Since 2008, he has collaborated with many projects in the jazz, traditional and classical music spheres in Barcelona, including aupaQUARTET and the Barcelona Gipsy Balkan Orchestra, performing in over thirty countries. He combines his passion for interpretation with pedagogy, teaching masterclasses across the Iberian Peninsula and internationally.

item.title: Pere Nolasc Plana Turu
item.description: A classically-trained violinist and violist who studied in Spain, the Netherlands and Germany, Pere Nolasc focuses his interests on improvisation and creativity. Since 2008, he has collaborated with many projects in the jazz, traditional and classical music spheres in Barcelona, including aupaQUARTET and the Barcelona Gipsy Balkan Orchestra, performing in over thirty countries. He combines his passion for interpretation with pedagogy, teaching masterclasses across the Iberian Peninsula and internationally.

item.title: Pere Nolasc Plana Turu
item.description: A classically-trained violinist and violist who studied in Spain, the Netherlands and Germany, Pere Nolasc focuses his interests on improvisation and creativity. Since 2008, he has collaborated with many projects in the jazz, traditional and classical music spheres in Barcelona, including aupaQUARTET and the Barcelona Gipsy Balkan Orchestra, performing in over thirty countries. He combines his passion for interpretation with pedagogy, teaching masterclasses across the Iberian Peninsula and internationally.

item.title: Susurro Čoček
item.description: “Susurro Čoček” (I. Kovačević). When a whisper from the past shows us who we are. Pere Nolasc Turu (Violin) · Victor Paradis (Manouche Guitar) · Julien Chanal (Manouche Guitar) · Ivan Kovačević (Double Bass) · Stelios Togias (Percussions)

item.title: Susurro Čoček
item.description: “Susurro Čoček” (I. Kovačević). When a whisper from the past shows us who we are. Pere Nolasc Turu (Violin) · Victor Paradis (Manouche Guitar) · Julien Chanal (Manouche Guitar) · Ivan Kovačević (Double Bass) · Stelios Togias (Percussions)

item.title: Susurro Čoček
item.description: “Susurro Čoček” (I. Kovačević). When a whisper from the past shows us who we are. Pere Nolasc Turu (Violin) · Victor Paradis (Manouche Guitar) · Julien Chanal (Manouche Guitar) · Ivan Kovačević (Double Bass) · Stelios Togias (Percussions)

item.title: Victor Paradis
item.description: Victor Paradis is a young and multifaceted French-Canadian guitarist who has performed at some of the main alternative music festivals in Spain. In a short period of time he has become an essential personality of the Barcelona music scene, delving into the aesthetics of gypsy jazz and world music through Bratia – a fusion of influences free of complexes.

item.title: Victor Paradis
item.description: Victor Paradis is a young and multifaceted French-Canadian guitarist who has performed at some of the main alternative music festivals in Spain. In a short period of time he has become an essential personality of the Barcelona music scene, delving into the aesthetics of gypsy jazz and world music through Bratia – a fusion of influences free of complexes.

item.title: Victor Paradis
item.description: Victor Paradis is a young and multifaceted French-Canadian guitarist who has performed at some of the main alternative music festivals in Spain. In a short period of time he has become an essential personality of the Barcelona music scene, delving into the aesthetics of gypsy jazz and world music through Bratia – a fusion of influences free of complexes.

item.title: Julien Chanal
item.description: Julien Chanal is a French musician of unparalleled talent on the guitar. He has joined Bratia as a rhythm guitarist, bringing his passion for manouche guitar to this fascinating project. His rhythmic prowess and knowledge of traditional melodies – also explored in the Barcelona Gipsy Balkan Orchestra – add a distinctive touch to the fusion of Balkan music and jazz manouche.

item.title: Julien Chanal
item.description: Julien Chanal is a French musician of unparalleled talent on the guitar. He has joined Bratia as a rhythm guitarist, bringing his passion for manouche guitar to this fascinating project. His rhythmic prowess and knowledge of traditional melodies – also explored in the Barcelona Gipsy Balkan Orchestra – add a distinctive touch to the fusion of Balkan music and jazz manouche.

item.title: Julien Chanal
item.description: Julien Chanal is a French musician of unparalleled talent on the guitar. He has joined Bratia as a rhythm guitarist, bringing his passion for manouche guitar to this fascinating project. His rhythmic prowess and knowledge of traditional melodies – also explored in the Barcelona Gipsy Balkan Orchestra – add a distinctive touch to the fusion of Balkan music and jazz manouche.

item.title: Stelios Togias
item.description: Born in Athens, Stelios Togias has performed more than five hundred concerts in over thirty countries with bands from the Barcelona music scene, including Aikar, Trio Feta and the emblematic Barcelona Gipsy Balkan Orchestra. A restless percussionist who has deeply investigated the rhythms of Middle Eastern musical cultures, playing instruments of Arabic, Persian and Ottoman Turkish origin.

item.title: Stelios Togias
item.description: Born in Athens, Stelios Togias has performed more than five hundred concerts in over thirty countries with bands from the Barcelona music scene, including Aikar, Trio Feta and the emblematic Barcelona Gipsy Balkan Orchestra. A restless percussionist who has deeply investigated the rhythms of Middle Eastern musical cultures, playing instruments of Arabic, Persian and Ottoman Turkish origin.

item.title: Stelios Togias
item.description: Born in Athens, Stelios Togias has performed more than five hundred concerts in over thirty countries with bands from the Barcelona music scene, including Aikar, Trio Feta and the emblematic Barcelona Gipsy Balkan Orchestra. A restless percussionist who has deeply investigated the rhythms of Middle Eastern musical cultures, playing instruments of Arabic, Persian and Ottoman Turkish origin.

item.title: Avís legal
item.description: Identificació i titularitat En compliment de l’article 10 de la Llei 34/2002, d'11 de juliol, de serveis de la societat de la informació i comerç electrònic, el Titular exposa les seves dades identificatives: Titular: Ivan Kovacevic NIF: x3687997q Domicili: Alegre de dalt 11, Barcelona - Espanya Correu electrònic: ivandoublebass@gmail.com Lloc web: https://bratiamusic.com Finalitat La finalitat del lloc web és: Promoure l’activitat professional. Condicions d’ús La utilització del lloc web li atorga la condició d’Usuari, i implica l’acceptació completa de totes les clàusules i condicions d’ús incloses a les pàgines:

item.title: Aviso legal
item.description: Identificación y titularidad En cumplimiento del artículo 10 de la Ley 34/2002, de 11 de julio, de Servicios de la Sociedad de la Información y Comercio Electrónico, el Titular expone sus datos identificativos: Titular: Ivan Kovacevic NIF: x3687997q Domicilio: Alegre de dalt 11, Barcelona - España Correo electrónico: ivandoublebass@gmail.com Sitio web: https://bratiamusic.com Finalidad La finalidad del Sitio Web es: Promover actividad profesional. Condiciones de uso La utilización del Sitio Web le otorga la condición de Usuario, e implica la aceptación completa de todas las cláusulas y condiciones de uso incluidas en las páginas:

item.title: Configuració de cookies
item.description: Com gestionar les cookies Pots configurar les cookies des del teu navegador. A continuació t’indiquem com fer-ho en els principals navegadors: Google Chrome Fes clic a la icona del menú (tres punts verticals) a la part superior dreta Selecciona “Configuració” Desplaça’t fins a “Privacitat i seguretat” i fes clic a “Cookies i altres dades del lloc” Selecciona l’opció que prefereixis Configuració de cookies a Chrome Mozilla Firefox Fes clic a la icona del menú (tres línies horitzontals) a la part superior dreta Selecciona “Configuració” Ves a “Privacitat i seguretat” A la secció “Cookies i dades del lloc”, tria l’opció desitjada Configuració de cookies a Firefox

item.title: Configuración de cookies
item.description: Cómo gestionar las cookies Puedes configurar las cookies desde tu navegador. A continuación te indicamos cómo hacerlo en los principales navegadores: Google Chrome Haz clic en el icono del menú (tres puntos verticales) en la parte superior derecha Selecciona “Configuración” Desplázate hasta “Privacidad y seguridad” y haz clic en “Cookies y otros datos del sitio” Selecciona la opción que prefieras Configuración de cookies en Chrome Mozilla Firefox Haz clic en el icono del menú (tres líneas horizontales) en la parte superior derecha Selecciona “Configuración” Ve a “Privacidad y seguridad” En la sección “Cookies y datos del sitio”, elige la opción deseada Configuración de cookies en Firefox

item.title: Cookie policy
item.description: What are cookies? Cookies are small text files that websites place on your device (computer, mobile phone, tablet) while you browse. They are essential tools for the functioning of the Internet and provide numerous advantages in the provision of interactive services. Types of cookies we use According to their purpose, we use the following types of cookies: Technical cookies: They are necessary for navigation and the correct functioning of the website.

item.title: Cookie settings
item.description: How to manage cookies You can configure cookies from your browser. Here’s how to do it in the main browsers: Google Chrome Click the menu icon (three vertical dots) in the top right corner Select “Settings” Scroll to “Privacy and security” and click “Cookies and other site data” Select the option you prefer Chrome cookie settings Mozilla Firefox Click the menu icon (three horizontal lines) in the top right corner Select “Settings” Go to “Privacy & Security” In the “Cookies and Site Data” section, choose the desired option Firefox cookie settings

item.title: insights
item.description: system: bratia-music analytics console status: active mode: read-only interpretation layer attraction_layer album_view concert_view video_view notes: what attracts attention without commitment intention_layer spotify_click youtube_click member_click notes: what generates external navigation conversion_layer ticket_click booking_submit email_click notes: what produces real-world action interpretation_rules high attraction + low intention = decorative content low attraction + high intention = hidden value high intention + low conversion = trust or timing issue warnings do not confuse visits with interest do not optimize for vanity metrics prioritize conversion signals

item.title: Legal notice
item.description: Identification and Ownership In compliance with article 10 of Law 34/2002, of July 11, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce, the Owner presents their identification data: Owner: Ivan Kovacevic Tax ID: x3687997q Address: Alegre de dalt 11, Barcelona - Spain Email: ivandoublebass@gmail.com Website: https://bratiamusic.com Purpose The purpose of the website is: To promote professional activity. Terms of Use The use of the Website grants you the status of User, and implies full acceptance of all the clauses and conditions of use included in the pages:

item.title: Política de cookies
item.description: Què són les cookies Les cookies són petits fitxers de text que els llocs web col·loquen al teu dispositiu (ordinador, telèfon mòbil, tauleta) mentre el navegues. Són eines essencials per al funcionament d’Internet i aporten nombrosos avantatges en la prestació de serveis interactius. Tipus de cookies que utilitzem Segons la seva finalitat, utilitzem els següents tipus de cookies: Cookies tècniques: Són necessàries per a la navegació i el correcte funcionament del lloc web.

item.title: Política de cookies
item.description: ¿Qué son las cookies? Las cookies son pequeños ficheros de texto que los sitios web colocan en tu dispositivo (ordenador, teléfono móvil, tableta) mientras lo navegas. Son herramientas esenciales para el funcionamiento de Internet y aportan numerosas ventajas en la prestación de servicios interactivos. Tipos de cookies que utilizamos Según su finalidad, utilizamos los siguientes tipos de cookies: Cookies técnicas: Son necesarias para la navegación y el correcto funcionamiento del sitio web.

item.title: Política de privacidad
item.description: Responsable del tratamiento Identidad: Ivan Kovacevic NIF: x3687997q Domicilio: Alegre de dalt 11, Barcelona - España Correo electrónico: ivandoublebass@gmail.com Sitio web: https://bratiamusic.com Finalidades del tratamiento Recogemos y tratamos tus datos personales con las siguientes finalidades: Gestionar las consultas realizadas a través del formulario de contacto Enviar información sobre conciertos, novedades y actividades del artista Gestionar la contratación de servicios Cumplir con las obligaciones legales Legitimación El tratamiento de tus datos se basa en:

item.title: Política de privacitat
item.description: Responsable del tractament Identitat: Ivan Kovacevic NIF: x3687997q Domicili: Alegre de dalt 11, Barcelona - Espanya Correu electrònic: ivandoublebass@gmail.com Lloc web: https://bratiamusic.com Finalitats del tractament Recollim i tractem les teves dades personals amb les següents finalitats: Gestionar les consultes realitzades a través del formulari de contacte Enviar informació sobre concerts, novetats i activitats de l’artista Gestionar la contractació de serveis Complir amb les obligacions legals Legitimació El tractament de les teves dades es basa en:

item.title: Privacy policy
item.description: Data Controller Identity: Ivan Kovacevic Tax ID: x3687997q Address: Alegre de dalt 11, Barcelona - Spain Email: ivandoublebass@gmail.com Website: https://bratiamusic.com Purposes of Processing We collect and process your personal data for the following purposes: Manage queries made through the contact form Send information about concerts, news and activities of the artist Manage the contracting of services Comply with legal obligations Legitimation The processing of your data is based on: Your express consent (for sending commercial communications) The execution of a contractual relationship (for the management of contracts) The legitimate interest of the Controller (to respond to queries) Recipients Your data will not be transferred to third parties, except by legal obligation or with your express consent.
